title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull and run large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models via Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package enabling Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding providers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with chat history, model management, and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper that adds fuzzy search, chat history, and prompt templates on top of Ollama.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration allowing Ollama models as generators and embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for using Ollama with LangChain, LlamaIndex, Docker, Kubernetes, and more.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-compose
summary: Production-ready Docker Compose stack including Ollama, Open WebUI, and GPU runtime.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings and LlamaIndex to chat with local documents.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama supporting threaded conversations and model switching.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing JavaScript/TypeScript bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official PyPI package exposing all Ollama endpoints including chat, embed, pull, and push.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Unofficial idiomatic Rust crate for Ollama with async/tokio support and strong typing.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Unofficial Dart/Flutter package enabling mobile and desktop apps to call local Ollama models.

title: ollama-rustico
summary: Lightweight Rust wrapper focused on minimal dependencies and WASM compatibility.
